word: G4455 - πώποτε - pṓpote - po'-pot-e - At any time

sections.paragraph:
- Original: πώποτε

- Transliteration: Popote

- Phonetic: po'-pot-e

- Definition:

1. ever, at any time

- Origin: from G4452 and G4218

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Adverb

- Strong's: From G4452 and G4218; at any time that is (with negative particle) at no time: - at any time + never (... to any man) + yet never man.
